tasks.title: Stats tracking system
tasks.description: Track cumulative play stats: tracksPlaced, sceneryPlaced, trainsRun, loopsCompleted, puzzlesSolved, passengersDelivered, crashCount. Persist in localStorage.
acceptance: All 7 stats track accurately across sessions
Stats persist via localStorage key 'trainTracks_stats'
Retroactive unlock: existing saves auto-unlock everything

tasks.title: Milestone definitions
tasks.description: 9 milestone tiers that unlock pieces progressively: Builder (10 tracksâ†’tjunction), Architect (25â†’crossover), Engineer (50â†’bridge), Miner (75â†’tunnel), Conductor (3 ridesâ†’station), Choo Choo Master (1 loopâ†’train cars), Naturalist (15 sceneryâ†’water/flower/sheep), Explorer (1 puzzleâ†’horse/duck/people), Rainbow Fleet (10 passengersâ†’extra train colors).
acceptance: 9 milestones with correct thresholds
Default unlocked: straight, curve, tree, house, cow, train-red
Each milestone unlocks correct pieces

tasks.title: Locked palette items
tasks.description: Palette pieces not yet unlocked appear grayed out with lock icon. Clicking shows requirement toast. Long-press (800ms) on any locked item triggers unlock-all.
acceptance: Locked items visually distinct (grayed, lock icon)
Can't drag locked items from palette
Click shows requirement toast with progress
Long-press triggers unlock-all
Both sidebar and mobile drawer respect locks

tasks.title: Stats & Milestones modal
tasks.description: New đź“Š button opens modal showing all play stats and milestone progress bars. Includes 'Unlock Everything' button.
acceptance: Stats modal shows all 7 stats
Milestones show progress bars with current/threshold
Completed milestones show checkmark
Unlock Everything button works
Modal follows night mode theming
Escape key closes modal

tasks.title: Unlock notification
tasks.description: When a milestone threshold is reached, show toast: 'đźŽ‰ Unlocked: [piece name]!' and refresh palette.
acceptance: Toast appears on unlock
Palette updates immediately (locked class removed)
Multiple unlocks from one milestone show individual toasts

tasks.title: Puzzle mode bypass
tasks.description: All pieces available in puzzle mode regardless of unlock status. Stats still tracked during puzzles.
acceptance: Puzzle palette shows all pieces unlocked
Sandbox palette respects locks after exiting puzzle

tasks.title: Random generator + keyboard bypass
tasks.description: Random generator uses all piece types regardless of locks. Keyboard quick-select (1-7) respects locks.
acceptance: Random generator creates varied layouts with all piece types
Keyboard shortcuts for locked pieces show requirement toast

testing_focus: New player experience: only basic pieces available
Stat increments fire correctly for each action
Milestone notifications appear at correct thresholds
Long-press unlock-all works on mobile and desktop
Stats modal displays correctly in day and night modes
No duplicate code blocks or syntax errors
